lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, can I ask you a question?

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: Oh yes, young fellow? Yes, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Who's that you're talking to Hegir?

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: Let me see, he appears to be a human of some sort.

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: What was your name again, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [player name].

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: It's [player name]!

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Well ask him what he wants then!

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: What do you want, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr... I don't know... A quest, maybe?

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: He says he's looking for his quest!

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: What makes him think he lost his quest in here?

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: What makes you think you lost your quest in here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No no, I mean, do you have a task of some sort for me?

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: Now he says he wants a task!

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Stop talking to that human and get back in here before I have a task for you!

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: No need to talk to me like that, Haera.

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: I'll talk to you in whatever way I like!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I hear someone calling my name in the distance…

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: No need to shout!

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: Calm down dear.

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: I don't see why.

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: Yes you did!

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: I did not!

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: What did you do that for?
